'''hadoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabbler|scabbler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabbler|scabbler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hadoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædeteth|hædeteth]] || [[word:hædetej|hædetej]] || [[word:hædetesh|hædetesh]] || [[word:hædete|hædete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadodototh|hadodototh]] || [[word:hadodotoj|hadodotoj]] || [[word:hadodotosh|hadodotosh]] || [[word:hadodoto|hadodoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadototh|hadototh]] || [[word:hadotoj|hadotoj]] || [[word:hadotosh|hadotosh]] || [[word:hadoto|hadoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadoftoth|hadoftoth]] || [[word:hadoftoj|hadoftoj]] || [[word:hadoftosh|hadoftosh]] || [[word:hadoftof|hadoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadototho|hadototho]] || [[word:hadotojo|hadotojo]] || [[word:hadotosho|hadotosho]] || [[word:hadotoko|hadotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadototh|hadototh]] || [[word:hadotoj|hadotoj]] || [[word:hadotosh|hadotosh]] || [[word:hadoto|hadoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadotothol|hadotothol]] || [[word:hadotojol|hadotojol]] || [[word:hadotoshol|hadotoshol]] || [[word:hadotokol|hadotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadotothotho|hadotothotho]] || [[word:hadotojojo|hadotojojo]] || [[word:hadotoshosho|hadotoshosho]] || [[word:hadotoko|hadotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadotothon|hadotothon]] || [[word:hadotojon|hadotojon]] || [[word:hadotoshon|hadotoshon]] || [[word:hadotokon|hadotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadotothoro|hadotothoro]] || [[word:hadotojoro|hadotojoro]] || [[word:hadotoshoro|hadotoshoro]] || [[word:hadotokoro|hadotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
